pr.title: Add Claude Code competitors comparison blog post
pr.body:
## Summary
- New blog post at `src/data/blog/claude-code-competitors-comparison.ts` covering Claude Code vs Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, OpenAI Codex CLI, Aider, Cline, Devin, Replit Agent, Zed AI, and Sourcegraph Cody
- Registered the post at the top of the blog index so it appears first on the blog page
- Featured + dated 2026-05-19; cross-links to the existing Cursor/Copilot post and other related guides

## Why
The existing `claude-code-vs-cursor-vs-copilot` post only covers the big three. This post widens the field to the full 2026 competitive landscape, groups tools by architectural category (terminal-native agents, AI-native IDEs, editor extensions, cloud agents, code-search + AI), and adds a persona-based buying guide. The two posts complement each other rather than overlap.

## Test plan
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] Visit `/blog/claude-code-competitors-comparison` locally and confirm rendering, tables, and internal links
- [ ] Confirm post appears in the blog index and on the homepage's featured list
pr.author: etheros-hash
